original_image_tags: FBI Department of Justice seal in the upper left corner.
A red stamp at the bottom center reads:

elements.description: United States Department of Justice / Federal Bureau of Investigation official seal and logo in the upper left corner. A red stamp at the bottom states: 'This document contains neither recommendations nor conclusions of any kind. It is the property of the FBI, and is a loan to your agency; it and/or its contents are not to be distributed outside your agency.'

judge.reason: Both agree on the FBI seal in the upper left corner and a red stamp at the bottom, but Description B adds specific quoted text inside the stamp that Description A omits.
